# Newsroom AI — Full Description

## What is Newsroom AI?

Newsroom AI is an open-source, AI-powered news aggregator designed to save time by summarizing articles and enabling audio playback via text-to-speech. It supports multiple content sources including RSS feeds, web scraping, and email newsletters.

The project follows a "Bring Your Own Keys" (BYO) model — users provide their own API keys for AI providers (e.g., Anthropic Claude, OpenAI) and TTS services.

## Key Features

### Content Aggregation
- RSS feed subscriptions
- Web scraping via Crawl4AI microservice
- Gmail newsletter integration (OAuth2)

### AI Processing
- Article summarization using LLMs
- Provider-agnostic: supports Anthropic, OpenAI, and more
- Configurable models and parameters

### Audio
- Text-to-speech for article summaries
- Edge TTS support (free, no API key needed)

### User Experience
- Progressive Web App (PWA) with offline support
- 7 languages: Polish, English, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Arabic
- RTL support for Arabic
- Daily news briefings (editions)

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend:** Next.js 15 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **Backend:** Next.js API Routes, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL
- **Scraper:** Python Crawl4AI microservice (Docker)
- **AI:** Provider-agnostic (Anthropic, OpenAI, etc.)
- **TTS:** Edge TTS
- **Deployment:** Docker Compose, Caddy reverse proxy

## Localization

Available in 7 languages:
- Polish (pl) — default
- English (en)
- German (de)
- French (fr)
- Spanish (es)
- Italian (it)
- Arabic (ar) — RTL supported

## License

AGPL-3.0 — Free to use, modify, and distribute with the same license.
